scripts.start: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$sandboxHome=(Join-Path (Get-Location).Path '.sandbox-userprofile'); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $sandboxHome | Out-Null; $drive=$sandboxHome.Substring(0,2); $path=$sandboxHome.Substring(2); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('USERPROFILE',$sandboxHome,'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('HOME',$sandboxHome,'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('HOMEDRIVE',$drive,'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('HOMEPATH',$path,'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('EXPO_HOME',(Join-Path (Get-Location).Path '.expo-home'),'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('METRO_CACHE_DIR',(Join-Path (Get-Location).Path '.metro-cache'),'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('EXPO_NO_DEPENDENCY_VALIDATION','1','Process'); $port=8081; $conn=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1); if ($conn) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force }; expo start --lan --go --clear --port $port"
scripts.start:api: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$sandboxHome=(Join-Path (Get-Location).Path '.sandbox-userprofile'); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $sandboxHome | Out-Null; $drive=$sandboxHome.Substring(0,2); $path=$sandboxHome.Substring(2); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('USERPROFILE',$sandboxHome,'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('HOME',$sandboxHome,'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('HOMEDRIVE',$drive,'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('HOMEPATH',$path,'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('EXPO_HOME',(Join-Path (Get-Location).Path '.expo-home'),'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('METRO_CACHE_DIR',(Join-Path (Get-Location).Path '.metro-cache'),'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('EXPO_NO_DEPENDENCY_VALIDATION','1','Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL','http://localhost:3000/api','Process'); $port=8081; $conn=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1); if ($conn) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force }; expo start --clear --port $port"
scripts.start:phone:api: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$sandboxHome=(Join-Path (Get-Location).Path '.sandbox-userprofile'); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $sandboxHome | Out-Null; $drive=$sandboxHome.Substring(0,2); $path=$sandboxHome.Substring(2); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('USERPROFILE',$sandboxHome,'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('HOME',$sandboxHome,'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('HOMEDRIVE',$drive,'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('HOMEPATH',$path,'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('EXPO_HOME',(Join-Path (Get-Location).Path '.expo-home'),'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('METRO_CACHE_DIR',(Join-Path (Get-Location).Path '.metro-cache'),'Process'); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('EXPO_NO_DEPENDENCY_VALIDATION','1','Process'); $port=8081; $conn=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1); if ($conn) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force }; $ip=(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object IPAddress -NotLike '127.*' | Where-Object IPAddress -NotLike '169.254*' | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty IPAddress); if (-not $ip) { throw 'IP local não encontrado' }; $api=('http://'+$ip+':3000/api'); $expo=('exp://'+$ip+':'+$port); [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL',$api,'Process'); Write-Host ('API='+$api); Write-Host ('EXPO='+$expo); npx --yes qrcode-terminal@0.12.0 --small $expo; expo start --lan --go --clear --port $port"
